metadata.description: Official Carbone skill — complete templating language reference covering tags, loops, conditions, formatters, aggregators, and all output formats (DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, HTML, Markdown, PDF)

plugins.name: carbone
plugins.description: Enables AI to build fully-featured Carbone templates using verified syntax: tags, loops, conditions, formatters, HTML/Markdown output, and embedding tags into AI-generated DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, ODT, HTML, Markdown, and PDF files.
